name: Email Security — Proofpoint + Mimecast
description: ATT&CK technique coverage for email security vendors Proofpoint and Mimecast. Coverage via NIST 800-53 controls SI-3, SI-8, SC-8, SC-26. Source: https://github.com/TeamStarWolf/TeamStarWolf/blob/main/data/vendor_to_technique.jsonl

techniques.comment: Proofpoint + Mimecast — SI-3/SI-8: email gateway inspection, sandboxing, and URL rewriting prevent phishing delivery
Proofpoint + Mimecast — Spearphishing Attachment: sandbox detonation and file type blocking
Proofpoint + Mimecast — Spearphishing Link: URL rewriting, time-of-click analysis, and link sandboxing
Proofpoint + Mimecast — Spearphishing via Service: lookalike domain detection and impersonation protection
Proofpoint + Mimecast — SI-8: phishing-for-information emails detected via threat intelligence and sender reputation
Proofpoint + Mimecast — Spearphishing Attachment (recon): attachment-based credential harvesting detection
Proofpoint + Mimecast — Spearphishing Link (recon): link-based credential harvesting detection
Proofpoint + Mimecast — SI-3: user execution of malicious email content prevented by sandbox detonation before delivery
Proofpoint + Mimecast — Malicious Link execution prevention via URL rewriting
Proofpoint + Mimecast — Malicious File execution prevention via sandbox
Mimecast — SC-8: email content inspection and DLP detects email collection/forwarding rules
Mimecast — Email Forwarding Rules: suspicious auto-forward rule detection
Proofpoint + Mimecast — Internal Spearphishing: compromised internal account sending phishing detected via behavioral anomalies
